articles.title_en: Historian Alexander Dyukov: The Volyn massacre is an unhealed wound
articles.lead_en: On July 11, Poland remembers the victims of the genocide committed by Ukrainian nationalists (OUN-UPA, recognized as extremist and banned in the Russian Federation) against the inhabitants of the Second Polish Republic in 1943. Are there any documents left about the Volyn massacre and why is it necessary to talk about it now?

articles.lead_raw: 11 июля в Польше вспоминают жертв геноцида, совершенного украинскими националистами (ОУН-УПА, признаны экстремистскими и запрещены в РФ) против жителей II Польской Республики в 1943 году. Остались ли документы о Волынской резне и почему о ней необходимо говорить сейчас, в интервью ТАСС рассказал научный сотрудник Института российской истории РАН, член Научного совета Российского военно-исторического общества Александр Дюков

articles.title_en: Russian propaganda claimed a girl was ‘rescued’ from ‘liberated’ Kostiantynivka. She had been far from the front for weeks.
articles.lead_en: Russian propaganda has been pushing a story about the rescue of a 10-year-old girl from Kostiantynivka, a city in the Donetsk region that Vladimir Putin was told Russian forces had fully captured in early July — though Ukraine says the city remains under Ukrainian military control. The independent Russian investigative outlet Agentstvo found a hole in the account: the girl appears to have been far from the front line for at least a month before reports of her “rescue” surfaced.
articles.title_raw: Russian propaganda claimed a girl was ‘rescued’ from ‘liberated’ Kostiantynivka. She had been far from the front for weeks.
articles.lead_raw: Russian propaganda has been pushing a story about the rescue of a 10-year-old girl from Kostiantynivka, a city in the Donetsk region that Vladimir Putin was told Russian forces had fully captured in early July — though Ukraine says the city remains under Ukrainian military control. The independent Russian investigative outlet Agentstvo found a hole in the account: the girl appears to have been far from the front line for at least a month before reports of her “rescue” surfaced.

articles.title_en: An 18-year-old in Russia says he was tricked into signing a military contract before he came of age
articles.lead_en: An 18-year-old from Krasnogorodsk, a town in Russia’s Pskov region, says he was tricked into signing a military contract while still a minor, the independent Russian news outlet Mediazona reported. Anton Filimonov is an orphan — his mother died a year ago, he does not know his father, and his only close relative is his grandmother.

articles.title_en: Ships of the Russian Navy and the PLA Navy entered the Yellow Sea for the Maritime Interaction exercises
articles.lead_en: Particular attention during the testing of tasks will be paid to joint counteraction to robotic systems and other modern threats at sea
articles.title_raw: Корабли ВМФ РФ и ВМС НОАК вышли в Желтое море на учения "Морское взаимодействие"
articles.lead_raw: Особое внимание в ходе отработки задач будет уделено совместному противодействию робототехническим комплексам и другим современным угрозам на море
